coreResponsibility.summary: A Kaltura Player plugin that integrates NPAW Youbora analytics SDK for Quality of Experience (QoE) and Quality of Service (QoS) video analytics tracking.

featureOwnership: Video playback analytics tracking (start, play, pause, seek, buffer, stop)
Ad analytics tracking (preroll, midroll, postroll, quartiles, clicks, skips)
Playback quality metrics (bitrate, rendition, playhead position)
Session analytics and custom event tracking
Live vs VOD content type detection
dataHandling: Player state events (play, pause, seeking, buffering, ended)
Ad break and individual ad events
Playback errors with category and code mapping
Content metadata (title, duration, live/VOD, resource URL)

upstream.name: @playkit-js/kaltura-player-js
upstream.description: Kaltura Player core that provides player instance, events, and plugin registration

upstream.name: @playkit-js/playkit-js
upstream.description: Core playback engine providing BasePlugin, MediaType, DrmScheme, and Error classes

downstream.name: NPAW Youbora Dashboard
downstream.description: Analytics data is sent to Youbora/NPAW backend for visualization and reporting

externalAPIs.name: youboralib
externalAPIs.description: NPAW Youbora SDK for HTML5 - core analytics library for video intelligence

entryPoints.description: Main entry point - registers the Youbora plugin with Kaltura Player
Core Youbora plugin class extending BasePlugin
YouboraAdapter - bridges Kaltura Player events to Youbora SDK

errorPatterns: Seek events not reported to Youbora
